title: (ARCHIVED) ShellShock Nations
description: (ARCHIVED) Modpack for ShellShock Nations, which is a GeoNations server based around the Create Mod and trains.
body:
(ARCHIVED) (ARCHIVED) (ARCHIVED)
# This modpack is for the ShellShocks Nations GeoNations server.

ShellShock Nations is a GeoNations server which has a focus on building infrastructure, factories and developing your country.

The modpack is mainly based around the Create mod and its various addons, we've also added a couple of custom recipes via KubeJS to make some items more difficult to obtain, such as Sturdy plates which now require molten steel instead of lava.


Currently we are using the 1:500 Minecraft Earth Map on our server

Our discord can be found [Here](https://discord.gg/7vfe6SBRjn)


## Thanks to the developers of the following mods:


[Dave's Building Extended](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/daves-building-extended) Pre 1.0.2 Versions only

[Permission to use Simple Shops](https://i.imgur.com/0PjpYEJ.png)

[Extended Bogeys port by Weido (Under GPL 3.0 License)](https://github.com/WeidosOddities/Extended-Bogeys-Borked#GPL-3.0-1-ov-file)


Many thanks to IThundxr for letting us use his Create Tab Fixer mod

[Permission to use Create Tab Fix](https://i.imgur.com/e7O2ddK.png)

[More Villagers](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/more-villagers)
